title: What is CloudDash?
content:
CloudDash is a next-generation observability platform designed to provide deep visibility into modern cloud infrastructure. By integrating with AWS, Google Cloud, and Azure, it aggregates metrics, logs, and traces into a unified dashboard, allowing engineering teams to monitor system health in real-time.

The platform utilizes a lightweight agent architecture that minimizes resource overhead while maximizing data collection efficiency. Whether you are running Kubernetes clusters on-prem or serverless functions in the cloud, CloudDash provides the tools needed to troubleshoot performance bottlenecks and maintain high availability.
